sc-counter-card.name: Counter Card
sc-counter-card.description: Demo component showcasing WeWeb-style scoped variables, properties, and workflows. Each instance has an independent counter.

sc-calendar.name: Calendar (DatePicker)
sc-calendar.description: Realistic date picker that exercises every component-lifecycle trigger (created, mounted, propertyChange, beforeUnmount) and common workflow step types (branch, multiOptionBranch, forEach, whileLoop, break/continue, passThroughCondition, timeDelay, navigateTo, navigatePrev, changeVariableValue, setVar, resetVariableValue, executeComponentAction, returnValue). Each instance has an independent year/month/selected-date, its own grid, and its own last-action log.

cal-wf-rebuild-grid.name: Rebuild Grid
cal-wf-rebuild-grid.description: Rebuild the 42-cell grid for the current year/month. One changeVariableValue computes the grid in bulk; a follow-up forEach iterates weekdays to stamp cal-v-last-action so the forEach step is demonstrated.

value.formula: Array.from({length:42},(_,i)=>{const yr=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-year-uuid']??2026;const mo=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-month-uuid']??0;const fd=new Date(yr,mo,1).getDay();const dim=new Date(yr,mo+1,0).getDate();const dn=i-fd+1;const inM=dn>=1&&dn<=dim;const d=dn<1?new Date(yr,mo,0).getDate()+dn:(dn>dim?dn-dim:dn);const ds=inM?yr+'-'+String(mo+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0'):'';const today=new Date();const tStr=today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const sel=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-selected-date-uuid']||'';return{day:d,inMonth:inM,dateStr:ds,isToday:ds===tStr,isSelected:ds===sel&&ds.length>0,idx:i}})

cal-wf-select-day.name: Select Day
cal-wf-select-day.description: Select the clicked day cell's date. passThroughCondition enforces minDate/maxDate; timeDelay gives visual feedback; returnValue surfaces the chosen date to the caller.

value.formula: new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0')

cal-wf-find-next-workday.name: Find Next Workday
cal-wf-find-next-workday.description: Advance the selected date by whole days, skipping Saturdays/Sundays. Uses whileLoop + branch + continueLoop/breakLoop to demonstrate loop-control step types.

value.formula: new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0')

cal-wf-classify-date.name: Classify Selected Weekday
cal-wf-classify-date.description: Read the weekday (0-6) of the selected date and branch to a different log message per weekday group.

sc-select.name: Select
sc-select.description: Dropdown select with popover option list.

props.className: flex flex-row items-center justify-between w-full h-[40px] px-[12px] rounded-[8px] border border-[var(--theme-border)] bg-[var(--theme-card)] cursor-pointer

text.js: const v=context?.component?.variables?.['sel-value']; if(!v) return context?.component?.props?.placeholder||'Select an option'; const opts=context?.component?.props?.options; if(Array.isArray(opts)){const m=opts.find(o=>o?.value===v||o?.label===v);if(m)return m.label;} return v;

props.className: w-full min-w-0 bg-[var(--theme-card)] rounded-[8px] border border-[var(--theme-border)] py-[4px] shadow-lg overflow-hidden

map.js: const opts=context?.component?.props?.options; if(Array.isArray(opts)) return opts.map((o,i)=>({...o,idx:i})); return (typeof opts==='string'?opts:'Option 1,Option 2,Option 3').split(',').map((o,i)=>({label:o.trim(),value:o.trim(),idx:i}));

props.className: flex flex-row items-center gap-[8px] px-[12px] h-[36px] cursor-pointer

sc-datepicker.name: Date Picker
sc-datepicker.description: Calendar popover date picker with month navigation.

props.className: inline-flex flex-row items-center gap-[8px] px-[12px] h-[40px] rounded-[8px] border border-[var(--theme-border)] bg-[var(--theme-card)] cursor-pointer w-full
flex-1 border-0 bg-transparent outline-none shadow-none text-[14px] h-auto p-0 min-h-0
w-[280px] bg-[var(--theme-card)] rounded-[12px] border border-[var(--theme-border)] p-[12px] shadow-lg
flex flex-row items-center justify-between px-[4px] pb-[8px]
w-[28px] h-[28px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-full cursor-pointer hover:bg-[var(--theme-muted)]
w-[28px] h-[28px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-full cursor-pointer hover:bg-[var(--theme-muted)]

map.formula: Array.from({length:42},(_,i)=>{const yr=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-year']??2026;const mo=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-month']??0;const fd=new Date(yr,mo,1).getDay();const dim=new Date(yr,mo+1,0).getDate();const dn=i-fd+1;const inM=dn>=1&&dn<=dim;const d=dn<1?new Date(yr,mo,0).getDate()+dn:(dn>dim?dn-dim:dn);const ds=inM?yr+'-'+String(mo+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0'):'';const today=new Date();const tStr=today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const sel=context?.component?.variables?.['dp-v-selected']||'';return{day:d,inMonth:inM,dateStr:ds,isToday:ds===tStr,isSelected:ds===sel&&ds.length>0,idx:i}})

sc-slider.name: Slider
sc-slider.description: Custom drag slider built from Box primitives.

value.js: const mn=context?.component?.props?.min??0; const mx=context?.component?.props?.max??100; const st=context?.component?.props?.step??1; const raw=mn+(event?.percentX??0)*(mx-mn); return Math.max(mn,Math.min(mx,st>0?Math.round(raw/st)*st:raw));
